svg.text: Layered architecture of the OBSCURA system
Docker container · Tor daemon embedded · single-analyst workstation
LangChain · streaming · exponential-backoff retry · provider auto-gating
• 4 tables: investigations · sources · seeds · custom_presets · WAL
• one-time JSON → SQLite import on first run
OBSCURA — Threat Intelligence Automation from Dark Web Sources · NED University of Engineering and Technology · Group CS-22052
